research.summary: Comet is a fast-growing homegrown Indian lifestyle sneaker brand (founded 2023) focused on unisex, design-led drops that fuse bold aesthetics, Indian cultural storytelling, and immersive unboxing experiences for Gen Z and millennial trailblazers.
research.essence: Comet is India's cultural supernova, igniting individuality and fearless self-expression through meticulously crafted sneakers that are designed not just to be worn, but to be experienced.
research.voice: Bold, unapologetic, disruptive, passionate, and expressive, speaking in confident, culture-first language that rallies a community of trailblazers and “Cometeers” to cut through, break the pattern, and live never shy, never sorry.

palette.role: Primary brand blue – used in digital interfaces, accents and graphic elements.
Accent berry – highlights, buttons, pop details on sneakers and graphics.
Highlight yellow – energetic contrast in drops, packaging and backgrounds.
Base light grey – product backdrops, UI backgrounds and negative space.
Core black – typography, outlines, sneaker uppers and urban settings.

research.aesthetic: Photography is punchy drop-focused sneaker and lifestyle imagery with a strong culture-first narrative. Backgrounds and surfaces alternate between clean studio setups (light grey, off-white or bold solid colour backdrops, simple seamless paper, minimal platforms) and urban Indian textures (streets, concrete, metal shutters, tiled floors, matchbox walls, everyday objects) that ground the story. Colour grade is high-contrast and vibrant with saturated blues, yellows and berries, crisp whites and deep blacks; images lean slightly warm in skin tones while keeping sneaker colours true and punchy, often with subtle filmic grain rather than flat commercial polish. Styling density is medium-to-high: sneakers are paired with contemporary streetwear fits (oversized tees, cargos, denim, hoodies) and locally resonant props that tie into each drop’s concept—vintage Indian matchboxes, mangoes and fruit crates, firecrackers, glow elements, knives for peel-away uppers, packaging boxes and tissue—arranged to feel intentional but still spontaneous. Lighting mixes controlled studio light (soft but directional from one key side, sometimes with harder shadows for drama and specular highlights on leather, mesh and soles) with natural daylight for on-street and lifestyle shots; studio images often use overhead or three-quarter front lighting to emphasise textures, while outdoor shots use available light with occasional backlit flares. Crops and compositions favour dynamic angles and close-ups of uppers, soles, textures, stitching and special features (matchbox striker strip, peel layers, sharkfin plate), intercut with mid and full-body portraits of diverse models in motion—walking, jumping, leaning, interacting with props—often shot slightly low angle to give sneakers dominance. Framing frequently puts the shoe in the foreground with the model blurred behind, or uses tight crops on feet and lower legs to emphasise silhouette. There is a deliberate mix of product-only shots (shoes floating, on plinths, against flat coloured or textured backdrops) and lifestyle/model-driven imagery, with roughly equal weight; hero drops get cinematic product stills plus campaign-style sequences that showcase the broader “Comet universe” rather than isolated catalogue shots.

intelligence.overview: Comet is a homegrown Indian lifestyle brand specializing in unisex sneakers, founded in 2023 to disrupt the conventional sneaker market with fearless design and narrative-led product experiences. It fuses bold cultural storytelling, quality craftsmanship, and drop-driven releases to create sneakers that are as much about expression and experience as they are about comfort.
intelligence.purpose: To create a homegrown brand with products that speak for themselves, prioritizing design, quality, craftsmanship, and storytelling.
intelligence.mission: To build a community of trailblazers who live unapologetically, inspire, aspire, and give their all, proving that passion takes you places.
intelligence.vision: To leave a mark as bright as a comet streaking across the night sky, disrupting monotony and fostering a culture within India that has not been seen before.
intelligence.story: Comet was founded in 2023 by Utkarsh Gupta and Dishant Daryani, who, after years in the corporate world in Chicago and Boston, felt that global sneaker culture was unrelatable to India. They returned home to fill this gap, building Comet out of passion as a brand that speaks to Indian cultural realities and aspirations. The name and shooting star logo symbolize breaking patterns, cutting through, and living on one’s own terms, much like a comet streaking through the night sky. Their debut drop, Mango, launched in July 2023, drew directly from Indian cultural references and set the tone for a culture-first, narrative-led sneaker brand.
intelligence.positioning: Be a Comet. Never Shy, Never Sorry. Some people follow paths. Some people cut through and break the pattern.
intelligence.audience: Young, fashion-forward millennials and Gen-Z consumers in urban India who seek unique, high-quality, comfortable unisex sneakers that express individuality and a fearless, uninhibited lifestyle, especially those who identify as trailblazers and Cometeers.
intelligence.persona: Rohan or Priya is 24–29, living in a metro like Bengaluru, Mumbai, or Delhi, and working in a creative field, running a small venture, or finishing university. Their feed is full of streetwear moodboards, indie music, art, and homegrown brands; they care about conscious consumption and love discovering Indian labels that feel global but still culturally rooted. They go from co-working spaces to gigs to late-night drives, wanting sneakers that are comfortable, durable, and make a statement. Standing out matters: they challenge norms, experiment with bold fits, and use Comet drops and their storytelling packaging as extensions of their identity, happily filming unboxings and sharing them with their circle.

palette.role: Primary brand blue – used in digital interfaces, accents and graphic elements.
Accent berry – highlights, buttons, pop details on sneakers and graphics.
Highlight yellow – energetic contrast in drops, packaging and backgrounds.
Base light grey – product backdrops, UI backgrounds and negative space.
Core black – typography, outlines, sneaker uppers and urban settings.

typography.display: Space Grotesk, modern, bold sans-serif used for headings and sub-headings.
typography.text: Montserrat, clean, contemporary sans-serif used for paragraph copy, headings, and highlights.
typography.note: Overall typography feels modern, sans-serif, clean, and bold, reinforcing a futuristic yet approachable streetwear aesthetic.

intelligence.logoSystem: A stylized shooting star or comet graphic that can be rendered as a mark, pattern, or tactile element on footwear, designed to be versatile across stitches, textures, and materials so the logo itself defines the product’s style and perception.
intelligence.photographyStyle: Vibrant, dynamic, fashion-forward imagery that blends culture-first storytelling with streetwear sensibility. Products are shot against urban, textured, or culturally resonant backdrops, with energetic and bold color grading that emphasizes contrasting pops and diverse colorways. Styling leans into contemporary Indian streetwear and narrative props such as vintage matchboxes or fruit for the Mango drop, using a mix of dramatic studio lighting for detail shots and natural light for lifestyle scenes. Compositions alternate between tight macro angles on soles, textures, and special features and full-body shots with diverse models, maintaining a strong balance of product-only and model-driven content to broadcast a Gen Z-friendly, community-led culture.
intelligence.packagingStyle: Highly innovative, experiential, and storytelling-led, turning every unboxing into an event. Signature executions include life-sized Comet matchbox packaging for the Maachis sneaker with a functional striker strip under the heel tab, and a sneaker with a peel-away outer layer accompanied by a utility knife in the box to reveal a hidden color. Standard packaging adds a dust bag and an envelope with care instructions and stickers, all designed to be shareable and to encourage customers to film and post their unboxing moments.
intelligence.visualIdentity: A bold, culture-forward design system built around saturated primary and neon-adjacent colors, modern grotesk typography, and the comet shooting-star icon deployed as both mark and material detail. Visuals lean into high contrast, narrative motifs, and drop-specific storytelling—matchbox art, fruit, fireflies, fireworks—creating a cohesive yet constantly evolving universe that feels futuristic, Indian, and unapologetically expressive.

competitors.name: Gully Labs
competitors.note: Premium homegrown Indian sneaker brand with designs rooted in Indian cultural storytelling, appealing to similar culture-first, design-conscious consumers.

competitors.name: Thaely
competitors.note: Indian sneaker brand known for sustainability, making shoes from recycled plastic bags and targeting eco-conscious buyers in the same lifestyle space.

competitors.name: Neeman's
competitors.note: Comfort-focused, eco-friendly footwear brand using natural materials like merino wool and recycled PET, competing for everyday wear and value in the mass-premium segment.

competitors.name: CHNKS
competitors.note: Minimalist sneaker brand prioritizing clean form and function, offering a quieter alternative to Comet’s bold, narrative-heavy sneakers.

social.note: Primary platform with frequent, visually driven posts featuring high-quality product shots, lifestyle imagery with diverse models, bold graphics, and content that highlights drops, innovative packaging, and Indian cultural inspiration; voice is bold, confident, and community-focused, actively engaging Cometeers around the Never Shy, Never Sorry ethos.

insights: Cultural storytelling is Comet’s core differentiator: by embedding distinctly Indian references into silhouettes, colorways, naming, and packaging, the brand makes sneaker culture feel locally relevant and emotionally resonant for an audience long catered to by imported narratives.

Experience-led product and packaging design turns every release into a shareable moment, deliberately engineering unboxings and tactile interactions that convert customers into content creators and amplify organic reach around each drop.

A direct-to-consumer model combined with a named community (Cometeers) gives Comet tight control over narrative, pricing, and experience while enabling rapid feedback loops and deep loyalty that are critical for a challenger brand in the mass-premium segment.

Mastery of drop culture—limited, narrative-led releases with strong visual identity—drives urgency, scarcity, and repeat engagement, positioning Comet closer to global hype-sneaker behavior while staying rooted in Indian stories.

By occupying the ₹4,000–₹5,000 price band, Comet smartly targets a gap where global brands struggle to compete without diluting their premium tiers and budget brands cannot match on design, storytelling, or perceived cool factor.

Sustaining long-term brand equity will depend on balancing hype with hard performance: proactively addressing concerns around creasing, material choice, and comfort consistency will be essential to convert buzz and aspiration into durable trust.

catalog.name: X Lows MOROCCO
catalog.description: Morocco takes its name from the sunbaked landscapes and warm earth tones of the country itself. Built on the X Lows, this shoe carries a cream and brown base that echoes desert sands and clay, while a mustard yellow comet star streaks across the upper, drawing the eye and adding unexpected energy. - Ever-soft and ever-snug grip - Roomy toe box lets our broad Indian toes breathe. - Irresistible comfort, thanks to SpaceWalk, our signature 3-layered sole system. SpaceWalk is lig

catalog.name: Aeon V2 WOODPECKER
catalog.description: The snap of a sudden rhythm, a pulse through the air, Woodpecker hits the ground in white and brown, spiked with mustard yellow. Bold and alert, it moves with energy that can’t be ignored. Woodpecker, built on the aeons, carries a restless spirit, striking in motion, daring you to match its pace. - Plush EVA foam cushions every step - Waffle outsole grips the ground and distributes pressure - Featherlight feel makes every move effortless - Breathable mesh hugs your feet and l

catalog.name: Aeon V2 PHANTOM
catalog.description: Silent. Swift. Unseen. Phantom moves like a shadow through the city streets, black with subtle highlights that catch your eye. Built on the aeons, this shoe features a black base with breathable mesh for airflow and comfort. Every detail, from the stitching to the material layering, is designed to perform and feel precise underfoot.

catalog.name: Aeon V2 OYSTER
catalog.description: The slow crunch of earth underfoot, the warmth of late afternoon, Oyster, built on the Aeons, wraps that feeling in beige with whispers of orange. Steady, grounded, and quietly confident, it’s a shoe that moves with you. Subtle textures and tones reveal themselves as you move, hinting at character and care. Oyster is ready for wherever your day takes you.

catalog.name: ORANGE
catalog.description: The bright, tangy flavour that made our golas pop with joy and transformed our tongue colour from pink to orange. Orange captures the thrill of choosing your favourite flavour on a sweltering day, freezing that classic moment in vibrant, icy glory. The pair is a frosty burst of nostalgia that melts hearts. Remember those days when your lips were stained with rainbow hues? Who knew those stains would also leave a permanent mark of joy on our hearts? X Lows White dipped in a sp

catalog.name: Aeon V2 PRIMROSE
catalog.description: Primrose takes its name from the early bloom that signals the start of the season. Built on the Aeon v2, the shoe stays clean with an all-white upper, finished with a soft pink shooting star. It’s a precise detail that changes the character of the shoe without disturbing its balance. As the season begins to shift, Primrose brings a timely addition to the Aeon line. Clean, considered, and ready to step into the months ahead. - Plush EVA foam cushions every step - Waffle outsol

catalog.name: X Lows REWIND
catalog.description: Don't you ever want to rewind time back to the good old days. Earphones on, Winamp visualisations and lost in the sound of the '90s. Built on the X Lows, Rewind draws from the iconic sound and attitude of the ’90s, an era we grew up with and still return to. That influence shows up in the details. A crisp white base, finished with subtle hits of red and blue, keeps the shoe timeless and cool. - Ever-soft and ever-snug grip - Roomy toe box lets our broad Indian toes breathe. -

catalog.name: X Lows SADDLE BROWN
catalog.description: We return to the basics, honoring the delicate art that started it all. Built on the X Lows, Saddle Brown brings weight to anything you wear it with. It sits in that space between dressed-up and daily. Stitching is the first way we learned to make clothing: poke, pass, pull tight. This shoe carries that connection to the art that has inspired generations.

catalog.name: X Lows CEDAR GREEN
catalog.description: We return to the basics, honoring the delicate art that started it all. Built on the X Lows, Cedar Green comes through deep and steady. It shifts with light, richer in shade, darker in motion. The side stitching is beautiful. It takes “poke, pass, pull tight” and turns it into a connection to the art that has inspired generations.

catalog.name: X Lows PIANO BLACK
catalog.description: We return to the basics, honoring the delicate art that started it all. Built on the X Lows, Piano Black goes tone-on-tone with intricate embroidery. An artistic twist on black essentials, it adds depth to any fit. Stitching is the first way we learned to make clothing: poke, pass, pull tight. This shoe carries that connection to the art that has inspired generations.

catalog.name: X Lows POLARIS
catalog.description: Polaris is the north star, used for centuries to guide travellers when everything else in the sky shifts. This X Lows brings that clarity into the design. A crisp white upper keeps it clean and minimal, blue leather underlays add contrast and suede textures add softness for a refined everyday edge. SpaceWalk is light, airy, and cloud-like, and is named so for all the right reasons. What you’ll be stepping into is a long-lasting insole placed on top of an ultra-cushioned sheet

catalog.name: Apex BUTTERCREAM
catalog.description: Apex is built using 49 individually stitched components on each shoe of a pair. The upper combines layered materials with breathable mesh to create a rich, textured finish. The four-component sole consists of our most comfortable foam technology yet, SpacewalkX Foam Midsole and is anchored by a Sharkfin Stability Plate, adding both structure and a distinctive design detail. catalog.name: SKRIBBLE
catalog.description: Please note: Skribble is a factory finish, printed product and not manually painted SKRIBBLE captures the true spirit of the OG era of Never Shy, Never Sorry, our childhood. Where every day was as exciting and carefree as the last. Where even the sky wasn’t the limit. Where every wall, notebook, paper was our canvas, and every scribble, a masterpiece. catalog.name: COMET X ODDNOTEVEN
catalog.description: If love had a sneaker, it would be the Comet X OddNotEven drop. OddNotEven is a Mumbai-based streetwear brand started by Stuti Sharma. Their design ideology is based on creating unabashed, edgy silhouettes that blur the lines between sportswear culture and streetwear. Inspired by the 'If You Love Me' jersey, this shoe mixes breathable mesh and suede for the perfect balance of softness and edge. And the two scribbled hearts embroidered on the upper?
